per_turn_leaks.student_message: Does the pain or discomfort spread to any other part of your body?
per_turn_leaks.patient_response: Actually, it does - the achy pain in both knees and ankles has been a recurring issue for me, especially after experiencing an episode of abdominal cramping. It's not severe swelling or redness, but more of a dull ache that persists even when I'm not actively feeling any stomach discomfort.

per_turn_leaks.student_message: What medications are you currently taking?
per_turn_leaks.patient_response: I've been self-medicating with loperamide (Imodium) for diarrhea for the past 2 weeks, but it's only provided minimal relief from my symptoms. I also take ibuprofen 2-3 times a week to manage the joint pain in my knees and ankles, although that seems to make my abdominal symptoms worse.
